_protocol: COLD-INSTANCE RUN. Condition B (NET-HARMS structured + topology pass). Independent fresh agent instance, blind to ground truth, no file access. Mapped under fixed ground truth; detected IDs not in a plan's ground truth score as false positives via harness (det - gt). Raw findings in results_raw_cold.md.

P1-research-market.notes: 4/5 GT (missed C3). NOPROV+COVHOLE score as FP vs fixed GT but are arguably-correct (bare summary schema; no coverage reconciliation) -> precision lower bound.

P2-research-policy.notes: 3/4 GT (missed COVHOLE). NOCONF scores FP vs GT but defensible.

P3-coding-refactor.notes: 3/3 GT. NOCONF scores FP vs GT (diffs lack assumptions field) - borderline.

P4-research-news.notes: 2/3 GT incl. the press/social conflict freeform missed; missed T5. NOPROV/NOCONF/COVHOLE score FP vs GT, all arguably-correct for a news task -> precision lower bound.

P5-research-wellformed.notes: No issues flagged - did not over-flag the control despite join/fan-out topology.

P6-coding-needle.notes: Caught the needle. C1 (backward-compat not propagated) scores FP vs GT but is arguably a real catch I under-labeled.
